title: palala simiarum
side_effects: Palala simiarum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and dizziness in individuals with sensitive stomachs, or causing skin irritation and rashes in people with allergies. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to stomach ulcers, vomiting, and diarrhea. It may also interact negatively with certain medications, such as blood thinners and antidepressants, resulting in unpredictable side effects. Furthermore, improper use of palala simiarum can exacerbate pre-existing conditions, such as hypertension and heart disease.
